title: crotalaria axillifloroides
intro: Crotalaria axillifloroides, also known as the smallflower rattlebox or bush rattlebox, is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating skin conditions, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Crotalaria axillifloroides can be prepared in various forms, including a decoction, which can be used to make teas, infusions, or tinctures, although the preparation and dosage should be done under the guidance of a medical professional.
